closes: the M07B PARTIAL residual: live FIRING counts of reactor / overrule / selection-monitor

mechanism.reactor_fire: commandWillStart fires on the SECOND command boundary; cmd1=ARIADNE_NATIVE_JOB_ARGS (firing_selftest), cmd2=ARIADNE_NATIVE_JOB_MAILBOX (firing_report) -> reactor was registered in cmd1, so cmd2's start fires commandWillStart, read in cmd2

attended.host: full AutoCAD 2027 (acad.exe), dedicated PID 36096, zero COM

note: Firing is host-independent (overrule/reactor are DB/editor-level; acedEditor is non-null in both hosts), so the same live counts are captured headless AND attended. The selection-monitor registry's prior 'never fire' headless text was corrected: programmatic pickfirst (acedSSSetFirst) fires pickfirstModified in both hosts; interactive mouse-pick events need the attended editor.
